summary: Frontend testing of iteration 3 'Vista comparativa mensual' in Carmagne admin. Verified sidebar entry, period selectors, KPI cards, rank table with medals/progress/inactive opacity, sortable buttons, and reviewed export handlers in code. Regression on Partes/Panel/Obras passed. All required data-testid attributes present and behavior matches spec.

issues: Selectors and KPI cards render correctly on dark theme; layout is consistent with other admin tabs

critical_code_review_comments: AdminPanel.tsx — file size keeps growing (now ~1480 lines). Consider extracting renderComparison + handleExportComparisonPDF/CSV + monthlyComparison useMemo into a dedicated MonthlyComparisonTab.tsx for maintainability.
monthlyComparison.maxHours uses Math.max(1, ...) — good fallback to avoid /0 in progress bar width when the month has no reports.

Inside renderComparison the local variable `sites` (s.sites) shadows the outer Site[] state `sites` — not a bug since it's scoped inside a closure, but readers of the JSX may be confused. Rename to `siteNames` for clarity.

The 'now' constant (`const now = new Date()`) is captured at component mount and reused inside renderComparison for the year-select options. If the admin keeps the panel open across midnight on Jan 1, options won't refresh. Acceptable for current MVP but worth noting.
Comparativa item uses BarChart3 icon (same as 'Panel'). Visually distinct labels in sidebar so OK, but consider a different icon (e.g. Trophy or LineChart) for stronger affordance.

Sidebar buttons in AdminPanel still lack data-testid attributes (only inner content has). Adding data-testid='sidebar-tab-comparison' etc. would make Playwright testing more robust; current tests rely on text role lookup.
test_credentials: Admin: admin / admin (modal opened via 'ADMIN PANEL' link, button label is 'Acceder al Panel'). Worker: phone +34 600999888 (Test Usuario, 12345678Z).
seed_data_creation: add_init_script seeded localStorage workers/sites/weekly_reports/logs but Firestore offline-cache rehydrated with the pre-existing dataset of ~20 workers from previous iterations, including 2 'TEST USUARIO' entries with 37.0h reports in week 2026-01-12. The live data (Total Partes=2, Horas Reporte=74.0h, Horas Fichaje=953:41:10, Trabajadores Activos=2/20 in January 2026) was used for visual + behavioral validation instead.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Seeding via localStorage is overridden by Firestore offline cache from earlier sessions: ~20 workers persist. To get clean data, clear localStorage AND IndexedDB ('firebase-installations-database', 'firestore/...'). Verified results in Enero 2026 (the month where Test Usuario reports live). Sort buttons toggle correctly: only the active one has bg-indigo-600 (verified). Rank medals (gold/silver/bronze on top 3) and opacity-50 on inactive workers (0 partes) are rendered. Exports: handleExportComparisonCSV writes BOM+UTF-8 with columns Trabajador,DNI,Partes Enviados,Horas Reportadas,Horas Fichaje,Semanas con Parte,Obras and filename comparativa_<MesNombre>_<año>.csv. handleExportComparisonPDF uses jsPDF + autoTable with same dataset and filename comparativa_<MesNombre>_<año>.pdf — both verified by code review (lines 537-581 of AdminPanel.tsx).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Implementation matches problem statement: data-testid='admin-comparison-tab', month/year selects, KPI cards with comparison-total-reports, sort buttons with comparison-sort-{hours,reports,name}, export buttons with the correct filenames, rows with comparison-row-<workerId>, medals + opacity-50 styling, progress bar proportional to maxHours.
